text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass boundary hints at the separation between observer and knowledge, and the brightly colored, modern displays behind it draw me in. I am reminded of the porous borders between technology, art, and philosophy – and my own tendency to seek meaning in spaces made for discovery. It's a place of learning, experimentation, and wonder, where the line between participant and observer blurs. I feel both grounded in the present and invited to imagine futures shaped by inquiry.
